# ITLibInitOptions.lazyLoadData

**Case**

iTunes library data loads upon request, rather than during initialization.

## Declaration

```swift
case lazyLoadData
```

## Init Options

- **ITLibInitOptions.none**: No initialization options apply.
title: ITLibInitOptions.lazyLoadData
